urls.title: Craterun
urls.description: Trade on Infinex and win a share of $2.5M

tweets.text:
.@kaiynne is the master of incentives.

check out this flywheel for Craterun:

More volume on Infinex → more revenue → more INX/Patron buybacks → higher FDV → more value in crates → more traders → more volume on Infinex

patrons are being swept.

any news? https://t.co/sB9xGCViip

So I’ve broken it down here as clearly as I can: INX vouchers are the alpha.

https://t.co/mIYgpsWcak

note_tweet.text:
So I’ve broken it down here as clearly as I can: INX vouchers are the alpha.

https://t.co/3WFndEzQc9

tweets.text:
The large perps traders are keeping the alpha to themselves, which is why you haven't seen this on the TL.  

But we don’t want that. We want to get our next wave of Patrons, 10x more in number but just as aligned.

You can choose when and at what market price you redeem the vouchers at (you have a year from the TGE to redeem), so if FDV is below voucher price, you don't need to redeem it until price is above it.

And obviously, some very large perps traders have figured out that crates, and https://t.co/tgOfrChKQp

note_tweet.text:
You can choose when and at what market price you redeem the vouchers at (you have a year from the TGE to redeem), so if FDV is below voucher price, you don't need to redeem it until price is above it.

And obviously, some very large perps traders have figured out that crates, and INX vouchers are EV+, because our builder code fees have been up only since announcing Craterun details.

tweets.text:
Which means if you are trading on Infinex perps the first days and weeks of Craterun, you are very likely to get vouchers at a price you like (up to 444x), as we are giving out up to 10% of the INX supply as vouchers in crates.

So let's model some prices out (with numbers for https://t.co/NiSPHswqgV

note_tweet.text:
Which means if you are trading on Infinex perps the first days and weeks of Craterun, you are very likely to get vouchers at a price you like (up to 444x), as we are giving out up to 10% of the INX supply as vouchers in crates.

So let's model some prices out (with numbers for illustration only).

tweets.text:
Firstly, there are 100,000 Patrons & there will be 10,000,000,000 INX. That’s the total supply of both Patrons & INX.

So the FDV = 100k Patrons * Price.

Based on current Patron price, FDV = $444m (though price of illiquid jpeg collection, usually trades at a discount to the

note_tweet.text:
Firstly, there are 100,000 Patrons & there will be 10,000,000,000 INX. That’s the total supply of both Patrons & INX.

So the FDV = 100k Patrons * Price.

Based on current Patron price, FDV = $444m (though price of illiquid jpeg collection, usually trades at a discount to the token representing the project, but that's a deep dive for another day).

tweets.text:
so wtf are they?

Vouchers give you the ability after TGE, to buy INX at an FDV between $1m-$500m (there will be a significant amount of $1m vouchers).

We've been clear that most of the lower FDV vouchers are in the earlier weeks / crates, but I’m still getting asked questions https://t.co/XFWWhgJUbl

note_tweet.text:
so wtf are they?

Vouchers give you the ability after TGE, to buy INX at an FDV between $1m-$500m (there will be a significant amount of $1m vouchers).

We've been clear that most of the lower FDV vouchers are in the earlier weeks / crates, but I’m still getting asked questions like this from our top yapper, so let's dig into why you want these + why you want them early.

tweets.text:

'how?!' i hear you cry

Craterun

There are multiple ways of earning crates, but most of the crates will be earned through https://t.co/iDGfzgk9YF

note_tweet.text:
But now's our opportunity to widen our distribution, so more people can be financially aligned to Infinex, without having to buy an illiquid fungible jpeg.

'how?!' i hear you cry

Craterun

There are multiple ways of earning crates, but most of the crates will be earned through trading on Infinex perps. It’s also the only repeatable way of earning crates.

After you earn a crate and open it, you've got a pretty strong likelihood to get INX vouchers.

tweets.text:
Patrons have been our super power over the last year, and its a two way relationship:

Patrons get access first to the cool new things we're building (currently wallet extension + wallet import), and we get critical, aligned feedback so we can hotfix and dial in the products https://t.co/scNJbFF9zB

note_tweet.text:
Patrons have been our super power over the last year, and its a two way relationship:

Patrons get access first to the cool new things we're building (currently wallet extension + wallet import), and we get critical, aligned feedback so we can hotfix and dial in the products before they go live to a broader audience.

It's really not as simple as gating features behind a 1.5 eth fungible jpeg.

tweets.text:
Ensuring the Infinex community are aligned investors has worked well for us in the past, last year we gave retail - its me, i'm retail - the opportunity to buy Patrons at three prices, from liquid to most locked: $5k, $3k, $1.25k.

Overwhelmingly community members chose the most https://t.co/oKHo8Z4j3M

note_tweet.text:
Ensuring the Infinex community are aligned investors has worked well for us in the past, last year we gave retail - its me, i'm retail - the opportunity to buy Patrons at three prices, from liquid to most locked: $5k, $3k, $1.25k.

Overwhelmingly community members chose the most locked version. What this has done, is created a core group of users and investors aligned with the project; Patrons.

tweets.text:
The second reason hasn’t been spoken about as much, which is, it's a 0 sum game.

Those that have figured out that INX vouchers are the alpha are disincentivised to share that information, especially on X.

Less players = more vouchers for them.

There are two things at play here; this is a novel distribution mechanism - our version of an airdrop, Kain went into detail on The Rollup about why we want aligned investors rather than airdrop farmers for INX.

https://t.co/PVM7IRYlHS

Why should you trade on Infinex Perps during Craterun?

The market has digested the Craterun campaign, and the headline prize draws. Prizes are easy to understand: $1m major prize, $100k a week, then NFTs & Patrons

But I think what's missing is that INX vouchers are the alpha https://t.co/7qUcGflNgM
